languages.text: {n}Фактотум встает с колен с заметной одышкой и склоняет посветлевшее лицо.{/n} "Рад услужить, Ваша Светлость".
{n}The Factotum rises from his knees with noticeable shortness of breath and inclines his now even-paler face.{/n} "Glad to be of service, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
languages.original_text: {n}Фактотум встает с колен с заметной одышкой и склоняет посветлевшее лицо.{/n} "Рад услужить, Ваша Светлость".

traits.locale_text: {n}The Factotum rises from his knees with noticeable shortness of breath and inclines his now-paler face.{/n} "Glad to be of service, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
{n}The Factotum rises from his knees with noticeable shortness of breath and inclines his now even-paler face.{/n} "Glad to be of service, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
{n}The Factotum rises from his knees with noticeable shortness of breath and inclines his now even-paler face.{/n} "Glad to be of service, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
{n}The Factotum rises from his knees with noticeable shortness of breath and inclines his now even-paler face.{/n} "Glad to be of service, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

languages.text: {n}El Factótum se levanta con una evidente falta de aliento y agacha su semblante, más lívido que nunca.{/n} «Siempre a su servicio, mi{mf|lord|lady}».
languages.original_text: {n}The Factotum rises from his knees with noticeable shortness of breath and inclines his now even-paler face.{/n} "Glad to be of service, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: {n}El Factótum se levanta con una evidente falta de aliento y agacha su semblante, más lívido que nunca.{/n} «Siempre a su servicio, mi{mf|lord|lady}».

languages.text: {n}高阶顾问喘着粗气站起身来，他那更显苍白的脸低垂着。{/n}“乐意效劳，大人。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Factotum rises from his knees with noticeable shortness of breath and inclines his now even-paler face.{/n} "Glad to be of service, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: {n}高阶顾问喘着粗气站起身来，他那更显苍白的脸低垂着。{/n}“乐意效劳，大人。”

languages.text: {n}Le souffle court, le factotum se relève et incline la tête, le visage encore plus pâle qu'à son arrivée.{/n} « C'est un honneur que de vous servir, Votre Seigneurie. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Factotum rises from his knees with noticeable shortness of breath and inclines his now even-paler face.{/n} "Glad to be of service, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le souffle court, le factotum se relève et incline la tête, le visage encore plus pâle qu'à son arrivée.{/n} « C'est un honneur que de vous servir, Votre Seigneurie. »

languages.text: {n}Kâhya, gözle görülür bir nefes darlığıyla dizlerinin üzerinden kalkıyor ve iyice solgunlaşan yüzünü eğiyor.{/n} "Size hizmet etmekten memnuniyet duydum {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri."
languages.original_text: {n}The Factotum rises from his knees with noticeable shortness of breath and inclines his now even-paler face.{/n} "Glad to be of service, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Kâhya, gözle görülür bir nefes darlığıyla dizlerinin üzerinden kalkıyor ve iyice solgunlaşan yüzünü eğiyor.{/n} "Size hizmet etmekten memnuniyet duydum {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri."

languages.text: {n}雑役係は膝から立ち上がり、息が切れている様子が伺える。顔はさらに蒼白になっている。{/n}「お役に立てて光栄です、御{mf|殿|女}様。」
languages.original_text: {n}The Factotum rises from his knees with noticeable shortness of breath and inclines his now even-paler face.{/n} "Glad to be of service, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: {n}雑役係は膝から立ち上がり、息が切れている様子が伺える。顔はさらに蒼白になっている。{/n}「お役に立てて光栄です、御{mf|殿|女}様。」

languages.text: {n}Das Faktotum erhebt sich schwer atmend von seinen Knien und senkt sein jetzt noch blasseres Gesicht.{/n} "Ich freue mich, wenn ich helfen kann, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}."
languages.original_text: {n}The Factotum rises from his knees with noticeable shortness of breath and inclines his now-paler face.{/n} "Glad to be of service, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
